final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "SNS topic with email subscription and customer-managed KMS encryption"
Resources:
  MyKmsKey:
    Type: "AWS::KMS::Key"
    Properties:
      KeyUsage: "ENCRYPT_DECRYPT"
      KeySpec: "SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT"
      Enabled: true
      PendingWindowInDays: 7
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: "Enable administration of the key"
            Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: "Allow SNS service to use the key"
            Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              Service: "sns.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - "kms:GenerateDataKey*"
              - "kms:Decrypt"
            Resource: "*"
  MyKmsAlias:
    Type: "AWS::KMS::Alias"
    Properties:
      AliasName: "alias/MySNSTopicKey"
      TargetKeyId: !Ref MyKmsKey
  SNSTopic:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: "MyNotificationTopic"
      DisplayName: "My Notification Topic"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MyKmsKey
      Subscription:
        - Protocol: email
          Endpoint: "test@test.com"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EC2 instance with SSM for secure remote management'

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2'
    Description: 'Latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI ID'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-subnet'

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rt'

  InternetRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group with no outbound rules for VPC endpoints'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress: []
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-sg'

  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ssm-role'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  S3Endpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.s3'
      RouteTableIds:
        - !Ref RouteTable

  SSMEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssm'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref Subnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  SSMMessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssmmessages'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref Subnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  EC2MessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ec2messages'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref Subnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  InstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeviceIndex: '0'
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref SecurityGroup
          SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-instance'
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-00655a11' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-00655a11: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SSMRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SSMRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'InstanceProfile: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'InstanceProfile: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'InstanceLaunchTemplate: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'InstanceLaunchTemplate: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPC: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SecurityGroup: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SecurityGroup: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'Subnet: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'Subnet: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'EC2Instance: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'EC2Instance: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'EC2MessagesEndpoint: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'EC2MessagesEndpoint: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'InternetGateway: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'InternetGateway: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'VPCGatewayAttachment: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'VPCGatewayAttachment: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'RouteTable: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'RouteTable: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'InternetRoute: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'InternetRoute: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'S3Endpoint: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'S3Endpoint: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SSMEndpoint: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SSMEndpoint: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SSMMessagesEndpoint: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SSMMessagesEndpoint: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'SubnetRouteTableAssociation: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SubnetRouteTableAssociation: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-00655a11: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'ENI with two EIPs and secondary private IPs for multi-IP public exposure'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIP-VPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIP-IGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIP-Subnet

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIP-RouteTable

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ENI with multiple EIPs
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIP-SG

  ENI:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkInterface
    Properties:
      Description: ENI with primary and two explicit secondary private IPs
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      GroupSet:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      PrivateIpAddresses:
        - PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.5
          Primary: true
        - PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.10
          Primary: false
        - PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.11
          Primary: false
      SourceDestCheck: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIP-ENI

  EIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIP-EIP1

  EIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiIP-EIP2

  EIP1Association:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP1.AllocationId
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref ENI
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.10

  EIP2Association:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP2.AllocationId
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref ENI
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.11

Outputs:
  ENI:
    Description: ID of the Elastic Network Interface
    Value: !Ref ENI
  EIP1Address:
    Description: First Elastic IP address
    Value: !Ref EIP1
  EIP2Address:
    Description: Second Elastic IP address
    Value: !Ref EIP2
  PrimaryPrivateIP:
    Description: Primary private IP of ENI
    Value: 10.0.1.5
  SecondaryPrivateIP1:
    Description: Secondary private IP 1
    Value: 10.0.1.10
  SecondaryPrivateIP2:
    Description: Secondary private IP 2
    Value: 10.0.1.11

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template that creates an AWS Client VPN endpoint, associated CloudWatch Logs, and a CloudWatch Dashboard with Logs Insights queries for monitoring VPN usage patterns.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Subnet1"

  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Subnet2"

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Client VPN endpoint
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: udp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPN-SG"

  PrivateCA:
    Type: AWS::ACMPCA::CertificateAuthority
    Properties:
      Type: ROOT
      KeyAlgorithm: RSA_2048
      SigningAlgorithm: SHA256WITHRSA
      Subject:
        CommonName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-CA"
        Organization: Example
        Country: US
      RevocationConfiguration:
        CrlConfiguration:
          Enabled: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateCA"

  ServerCertificate:
    Type: AWS::ACMPCA::Certificate
    Properties:
      CertificateAuthorityArn: !Ref PrivateCA
      CertificateSigningRequest: !GetAtt PrivateCA.CertificateSigningRequest
      SigningAlgorithm: SHA256WITHRSA
      TemplateArn: arn:aws:acm-pca:::template/EndEntityCertificate/V1
      Validity:
        Type: DAYS
        Value: 365

  LogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/clientvpn/${AWS::StackName}"
      RetentionInDays: 30

  Dashboard:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Dashboard
    Properties:
      DashboardName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ClientVPNDashboard"
      DashboardBody: !Sub
        - |
          {
            "start": "-PT24H",
            "end": "P0D",
            "periodOverride": "inherit",
            "widgets": [
              {
                "type": "log",
                "x": 0,
                "y": 0,
                "width": 12,
                "height": 6,
                "properties": {
                  "query": "SOURCE '${LogGroupName}' | fields @timestamp, @message\n| filter @message like /connection-end/\n| parse @message /.*connection-duration\":([0-9.]+).*/ as duration\n| parse @message /.*common-name\":\"([^\"]+)\".*/ as user\n| parse @message /.*ingress-bytes\":([0-9]+).*/ as ingressBytes\n| parse @message /.*egress-bytes\":([0-9]+).*/ as egressBytes\n| stats sum(duration) as totalDuration, sum(ingressBytes) as totalIngress, sum(egressBytes) as totalEgress, count() as connections by user\n| sort totalDuration desc\n| limit 20",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "title": "Top Users by Connection Duration",
                  "view": "table"
                }
              },
              {
                "type": "log",
                "x": 12,
                "y": 0,
                "width": 12,
                "height": 6,
                "properties": {
                  "query": "SOURCE '${LogGroupName}' | fields @timestamp, @message\n| filter @message like /connection-end/\n| parse @message /.*connection-duration\":([0-9.]+).*/ as duration\n| parse @message /.*authentication-method\":\"([^\"]+)\".*/ as authMethod\n| parse @message /.*ingress-bytes\":([0-9]+).*/ as ingressBytes\n| parse @message /.*egress-bytes\":([0-9]+).*/ as egressBytes\n| stats count() as connections, avg(duration) as avgDuration, sum(ingressBytes+egressBytes) as totalDataTransfer by authMethod\n| sort connections desc",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "title": "Authentication Method Breakdown",
                  "view": "table"
                }
              },
              {
                "type": "log",
                "x": 0,
                "y": 6,
                "width": 12,
                "height": 6,
                "properties": {
                  "query": "SOURCE '${LogGroupName}' | fields @timestamp, @message\n| filter @message like /connection-end/\n| parse @message /.*endpoint-id\":\"([^\"]+)\".*/ as endpointId\n| parse @message /.*connection-duration\":([0-9.]+).*/ as duration\n| parse @message /.*ingress-bytes\":([0-9]+).*/ as ingressBytes\n| parse @message /.*egress-bytes\":([0-9]+).*/ as egressBytes\n| stats count() as connections, avg(duration) as avgDuration, sum(ingressBytes+egressBytes) as totalData by endpointId\n| sort connections desc",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "title": "Endpoint-Specific Usage",
                  "view": "table"
                }
              },
              {
                "type": "log",
                "x": 12,
                "y": 6,
                "width": 12,
                "height": 6,
                "properties": {
                  "query": "SOURCE '${LogGroupName}' | fields @timestamp, @message\n| filter @message like /connection-(start|end)/\n| parse @message /.*common-name\":\"([^\"]+)\".*/ as user\n| stats count_distinct(user) as distinctUsers, count() as totalConnections by bin(1h)\n| sort @timestamp desc\n| limit 48",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "title": "Distinct User Statistics Over Time",
                  "view": "table"
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        - LogGroupName: !Ref LogGroup

prompt: We need a CloudFormation template that creates a CloudWatch Dashboard and a set of CloudWatch Logs Insights queries to monitor and analyze AWS Client VPN usage patterns. The solution should aggregate metrics such as connection durations, data transfer volumes (ingress/egress), and user activity across different authentication methods (AD/SAML, Mutual Auth, and Mixed Auth). The template must organize queries into a logical folder structure and display results in a centralized dashboard with tables showing endpoint-specific usage, distinct user statistics, and authentication-type breakdowns.
resources: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition, AWS::CloudWatch::Dashboard

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for EFS with cross-AZ EC2 instances, performance monitoring, and cfn-signal integration.'

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2
    Description: 'SSM public parameter path for the latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI. Resolves per region automatically.'
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    Description: 'EC2 instance type.'
    AllowedValues: [t2.micro, t2.small, t3.micro, t3.small, t3.medium]
  VpcCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: 'CIDR block for the VPC.'
  Subnet1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: 'CIDR block for subnet in AZ1.'
  Subnet2CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: 'CIDR block for subnet in AZ2.'
  AllowedSshCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/8
    Description: 'CIDR block allowed to SSH into EC2 instances. Default restricts to private RFC 1918 range; override with your public IP if remote SSH is needed.'

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDR
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Subnets
  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref Subnet1CIDR
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '0'
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref AWS::Region
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Subnet1'

  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref Subnet2CIDR
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '1'
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref AWS::Region
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Subnet2'

  # Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PubRT'

  DefaultRouteToInternet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  Subnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Network ACL
  NetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NACL'

  InboundRuleNFS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDR
      PortRange:
        From: 2049
        To: 2049

  InboundRuleSSH:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 101
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: !Ref AllowedSshCIDR
      PortRange:
        From: 22
        To: 22

  InboundRuleEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 102
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  OutboundRuleAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 0
        To: 65535

  Subnet1NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl

  Subnet2NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl

  # Security Groups
  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for EC2 instances'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedSshCIDR
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2SG'

  # Security group for VPC Endpoints
  VPCEndpointSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for VPC Endpoints'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCEndpointSG'

  EFSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for EFS file system'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFSSG'

  # EFS File System
  EFSFileSystem:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    Properties:
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      Encrypted: true
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFS'

  # EFS Mount Targets
  EFSMountTarget1:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSSecurityGroup

  EFSMountTarget2:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSSecurityGroup

  # IAM Role and Instance Profile
  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EFSMountPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - elasticfilesystem:ClientMount
                  - elasticfilesystem:ClientRootAccess
                  - elasticfilesystem:ClientWrite
                  - elasticfilesystem:DescribeMountTargets
                Resource: !GetAtt EFSFileSystem.Arn

  EC2InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  # VPC Endpoints for SSM, EC2 Messages, and CloudFormation (Interface)
  SSMEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssm'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref VPCEndpointSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  SSMMessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssmmessages'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref VPCEndpointSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  EC2MessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ec2messages'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref VPCEndpointSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  CloudFormationEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.cloudformation'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref VPCEndpointSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  # VPC Endpoint for S3 (Gateway)
  S3Endpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.s3'
      VpcEndpointType: Gateway
      RouteTableIds:
        - !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Launch Template for EC2 instances (IMDSv2, encrypted root volume)
  EC2LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
              VolumeSize: 20
              VolumeType: gp3

  # EC2 Instances
  EC2Instance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DependsOn:
      - EFSMountTarget1
      - EFSMountTarget2
      - SSMEndpoint
      - SSMMessagesEndpoint
      - EC2MessagesEndpoint
      - CloudFormationEndpoint
      - S3Endpoint
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Count: 1
        Timeout: PT10M
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref EC2LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt EC2LaunchTemplate.DefaultVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeSize: 20
            VolumeType: gp3
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub
          - |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -e
            # Install nfs-utils if not present (Amazon Linux 2 includes it)
            yum install -y nfs-utils
            # Create mount point
            mkdir -p /mnt/efs
            # Retry until mount target is available
            RETRIES=30
            SLEEP=10
            MOUNT_POINT="/mnt/efs"
            EFS_DNS="${EFSDNS}"
            MOUNT_OPTIONS="nfs4 nfsvers=4.1,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576,hard,timeo=600,retrans=2,_netdev,noresvport"
            for i in $(seq 1 $RETRIES); do
              echo "Attempt $i to mount EFS..."
              mount -t nfs4 -o "$MOUNT_OPTIONS" "$EFS_DNS:/" "$MOUNT_POINT" && break
              sleep $SLEEP
            done
            if mountpoint -q "$MOUNT_POINT"; then
              echo "EFS mounted successfully."
              /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal --region ${AWS::Region} --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2Instance1
            else
              echo "Failed to mount EFS after $RETRIES attempts."
              exit 1
            fi
            # Write mount to fstab for persistence
            echo "$EFS_DNS:/ $MOUNT_POINT nfs4 $MOUNT_OPTIONS 0 0" >> /etc/fstab
          - EFSDNS: !Sub "${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2-AZ1'

  EC2Instance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DependsOn:
      - EFSMountTarget1
      - EFSMountTarget2
      - SSMEndpoint
      - SSMMessagesEndpoint
      - EC2MessagesEndpoint
      - CloudFormationEndpoint
      - S3Endpoint
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Count: 1
        Timeout: PT10M
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref EC2InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref EC2LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt EC2LaunchTemplate.DefaultVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeSize: 20
            VolumeType: gp3
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub
          - |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -e
            # Install nfs-utils if not present
            yum install -y nfs-utils
            # Create mount point
            mkdir -p /mnt/efs
            # Retry until mount target is available
            RETRIES=30
            SLEEP=10
            MOUNT_POINT="/mnt/efs"
            EFS_DNS="${EFSDNS}"
            MOUNT_OPTIONS="nfs4 nfsvers=4.1,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576,hard,timeo=600,retrans=2,_netdev,noresvport"
            for i in $(seq 1 $RETRIES); do
              echo "Attempt $i to mount EFS..."
              mount -t nfs4 -o "$MOUNT_OPTIONS" "$EFS_DNS:/" "$MOUNT_POINT" && break
              sleep $SLEEP
            done
            if mountpoint -q "$MOUNT_POINT"; then
              echo "EFS mounted successfully."
              /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal --region ${AWS::Region} --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2Instance2
            else
              echo "Failed to mount EFS after $RETRIES attempts."
              exit 1
            fi
            # Write mount to fstab for persistence
            echo "$EFS_DNS:/ $MOUNT_POINT nfs4 $MOUNT_OPTIONS 0 0" >> /etc/fstab
          - EFSDNS: !Sub "${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2-AZ2'

  # CloudWatch Alarms for EFS
  EFSIOLimitAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFS-PercentIOLimit'
      AlarmDescription: 'Alert when EFS I/O limit usage exceeds 95%'
      MetricName: PercentIOLimit
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 95
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      ActionsEnabled: true
      AlarmActions: []
      OKActions: []
      InsufficientDataActions: []

  EFSThroughputAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EFS-ThroughputPercent'
      AlarmDescription: 'Alert when EFS throughput utilization exceeds 80%'
      MetricName: PercentThroughputLimit
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 80
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      ActionsEnabled: true
      AlarmActions: []
      OKActions: []
      InsufficientDataActions: []

prompt: We need a CloudFormation template that creates a EFS file system with cross-AZ EC2 instances and performance monitoring which provides shared storage for applications requiring multi-AZ accessibility. The solution should also launch two EC2 instances in separate AZs with IAM roles granting EFS access and SSM permissions, automating EFS mounting via user data scripts that retry until mount targets are available. Configure CloudWatch alarms to monitor EFS I/O limits and throughput utilization, triggering alerts at 95% I/O limit and 80% throughput thresholds. Note to establish a VPC with public subnets, internet gateway, and network ACLs to support EFS and EC2 connectivity while enforcing security group rules for controlled NFS access. Use cfn-signal and CreationPolicies to ensure instances successfully mount EFS before stack completion, avoiding partial deployments.

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Etherpad deployment pipeline using CodeDeploy with CloudFront, ALB, ASG, RDS MySQL, SSM, S3'

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2

  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium

  DBInstanceClass:
    Type: String
    Default: db.t3.small

  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: etherpad

  DBUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: etherpad_admin

  EtherpadPort:
    Type: Number
    Default: 9001

  DomainName:
    Type: String
    Default: example.com
    Description: Domain name for SSL certificate (DNS validation must be completed)

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public subnets for ALB and ASG (no public IP auto-assign)
  SubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadSubnetA

  SubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadSubnetB

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadPublicRT

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  SubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  # Security Groups
  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for internal ALB accepting traffic from CloudFront
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourcePrefixListId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/global-infrastructure/cloudfront/origin-facing/ipv4}}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadALBSG

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Etherpad EC2 instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: !Ref EtherpadPort
          ToPort: !Ref EtherpadPort
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadEC2SG

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS MySQL
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadRDSSG

  # RDS Subnet Group
  RDSSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for RDS MySQL
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref SubnetA
        - !Ref SubnetB

  # Secrets Manager secret for DB password
  DBPasswordSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: /etherpad/db/password
      Description: Master password for Etherpad RDS instance
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: !Sub '{"username":"${DBUsername}"}'
        GenerateStringKey: password
        PasswordLength: 16
        ExcludePunctuation: true

  # SSM Parameters for database configuration
  DBHostParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Type: String
      Name: /etherpad/db/host
      Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address

  DBPortParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Type: String
      Name: /etherpad/db/port
      Value: '3306'

  DBNameParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Type: String
      Name: /etherpad/db/name
      Value: !Ref DBName

  DBUsernameParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Type: String
      Name: /etherpad/db/username
      Value: !Ref DBUsername

  DBPasswordParameter:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Type: String
      Name: /etherpad/db/password
      Value: '{{resolve:secretsmanager:/etherpad/db/password:SecretString:password}}'

  # KMS Key for S3 SSE-KMS encryption
  KmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for S3 bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Encrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Enabled: true

  KmsAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/etherpad-artifacts-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KmsKey

  # S3 Bucket for CodeDeploy artifacts
  ArtifactBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'etherpad-artifacts-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KmsKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  # IAM Roles
  EC2InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EtherpadEC2Policy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt ArtifactBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${ArtifactBucket.Arn}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:SignalResource
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - codedeploy:GetDeployment
                  - codedeploy:GetApplication
                  - codedeploy:GetApplicationRevision
                  - codedeploy:RegisterApplicationRevision
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:DescribeTags
                Resource: '*'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2InstanceRole

  CodeDeployServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: codedeploy.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSCodeDeployRole

  # IAM role for Lambda custom resource
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaImportsCertToACM
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - acm:ImportCertificate
                  - acm:DeleteCertificate
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: '*'

  # Lambda function to generate self-signed certificate for internal ALB
  SelfSignedCertFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.11
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import subprocess
          import os
          import boto3
          import cfnresponse
          from datetime import datetime, timedelta

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              if event['RequestType'] == 'Delete':
                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS, {})
                  return

              try:
                  domain_name = event['ResourceProperties']['DomainName']

                  # Create OpenSSL config file for SAN
                  config_content = f"""[req]
              distinguished_name = req_distinguished_name
              x509_extensions = v3_req
              prompt = no
              [req_distinguished_name]
              CN = {domain_name}
              [v3_req]
              keyUsage = keyEncipherment, digitalSignature
              extendedKeyUsage = serverAuth
              subjectAltName = @alt_names
              [alt_names]
              DNS.1 = {domain_name}
              """
                  with open('/tmp/openssl.cnf', 'w') as f:
                      f.write(config_content)

                  # Generate private key and self-signed certificate
                  subprocess.run([
                      'openssl', 'req', '-x509', '-newkey', 'rsa:2048',
                      '-keyout', '/tmp/private.pem',
                      '-out', '/tmp/certificate.pem',
                      '-days', '365',
                      '-nodes',
                      '-config', '/tmp/openssl.cnf'
                  ], check=True, capture_output=True)

                  # Read the generated files
                  with open('/tmp/certificate.pem', 'rb') as f:
                      cert_body = f.read()
                  with open('/tmp/private.pem', 'rb') as f:
                      private_key = f.read()

                  # Import the certificate into ACM
                  acm = boto3.client('acm')
                  response = acm.import_certificate(
                      Certificate=cert_body,
                      PrivateKey=private_key
                  )

                  cert_arn = response['CertificateArn']

                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.SUCCESS,
                      {'CertificateArn': cert_arn})

              except Exception as e:
                  cfnresponse.send(event, context, cfnresponse.FAILED,
                      {'Error': str(e)})

  # Custom resource to invoke Lambda and get the ALB certificate ARN
  ALBCertificate:
    Type: Custom::SelfSignedCertificate
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt SelfSignedCertFunction.Arn
      DomainName: !GetAtt ApplicationLoadBalancer.DNSName

  # SSL Certificate for CloudFront HTTPS
  SSLCertificate:
    Type: AWS::CertificateManager::Certificate
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref DomainName
      ValidationMethod: DNS

  # WAF WebACL for CloudFront
  WebACL:
    Type: AWS::WAFv2::WebACL
    Properties:
      Name: EtherpadWAF
      Scope: CLOUDFRONT
      DefaultAction:
        Allow: {}
      VisibilityConfig:
        SampledRequestsEnabled: true
        CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
        MetricName: EtherpadWAFMetrics
      Rules: []

  # Launch Template
  EtherpadLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -ex

            # Update system and install dependencies
            yum update -y
            yum install -y git curl wget ruby

            # Install Node.js 16.x (LTS)
            curl -sL https://rpm.nodesource.com/setup_16.x | bash -
            yum install -y nodejs

            # Install CodeDeploy Agent
            wget https://aws-codedeploy-${AWS::Region}.s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/latest/install
            chmod +x ./install
            ./install auto
            service codedeploy-agent start

            # Install cfn-signal (via pip)
            pip3 install https://s3.amazonaws.com/cloudformation-examples/aws-cfn-bootstrap-py3-latest.tar.gz

            # Signal CloudFormation that instance is ready
            /usr/local/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EtherpadAutoScalingGroup --region ${AWS::Region}

  # Auto Scaling Group
  EtherpadAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Count: 1
        Timeout: PT10M
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: EtherpadASG
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref EtherpadLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt EtherpadLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '3'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref SubnetA
        - !Ref SubnetB
      TargetGroupARNs:
        - !Ref TargetGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadInstance
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  # Internal Application Load Balancer
  ApplicationLoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: EtherpadALB
      Scheme: internal
      Subnets:
        - !Ref SubnetA
        - !Ref SubnetB
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      LoadBalancerAttributes:
        - Key: routing.http.drop_invalid_header_fields.enabled
          Value: true

  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: EtherpadTG
      Port: !Ref EtherpadPort
      Protocol: HTTP
      TargetType: instance
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      HealthCheckPath: /
      HealthCheckPort: !Ref EtherpadPort
      HealthCheckProtocol: HTTP
      HealthCheckIntervalSeconds: 30
      HealthyThresholdCount: 2
      UnhealthyThresholdCount: 2
      TargetGroupAttributes:
        - Key: deregistration_delay.timeout_seconds
          Value: '60'

  # HTTPS Listener (backend) with self-signed certificate
  ALBListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: forward
          TargetGroupArn: !Ref TargetGroup
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ApplicationLoadBalancer
      Port: 443
      Protocol: HTTPS
      Certificates:
        - CertificateArn: !GetAtt ALBCertificate.CertificateArn

  # Auto Scaling policy (CPU-based)
  ASGScalingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Ref EtherpadAutoScalingGroup
      PolicyType: TargetTrackingScaling
      TargetTrackingConfiguration:
        PredefinedMetricSpecification:
          PredefinedMetricType: ASGAverageCPUUtilization
        TargetValue: 50

  # RDS MySQL Instance
  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Delete
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: EtherpadDB
      Engine: MySQL
      EngineVersion: 8.0.45
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref DBInstanceClass
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageType: gp2
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      MasterUsername: !Ref DBUsername
      MasterUserPassword: '{{resolve:secretsmanager:/etherpad/db/password:SecretString:password}}'
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref RDSSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      MultiAZ: false
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      EnablePerformanceInsights: false
      StorageEncrypted: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadDB

  # CloudFront Distribution (public-facing entry point)
  CloudFrontDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Enabled: true
        WebACLId: !GetAtt WebACL.Arn
        DefaultRootObject: ''
        Comment: CloudFront distribution for Etherpad
        Origins:
          - Id: ALBOrigin
            DomainName: !GetAtt ApplicationLoadBalancer.DNSName
            CustomOriginConfig:
              OriginProtocolPolicy: https-only
              OriginSSLProtocols:
                - TLSv1.2
              HTTPSPort: 443
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: ALBOrigin
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - DELETE
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
            - PATCH
            - POST
            - PUT
          CachedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
          CachePolicyId: 4135ea2d-6df8-44a3-9df3-4b5a84be39ad
          OriginRequestPolicyId: 216adef6-5c7f-47e4-bc0c-0b6b1a77bc5b
        ViewerCertificate:
          AcmCertificateArn: !Ref SSLCertificate
          SslSupportMethod: sni-only
          MinimumProtocolVersion: TLSv1.2_2021
        PriceClass: PriceClass_100
        IPV6Enabled: true

  # CodeDeploy Resources
  CodeDeployApplication:
    Type: AWS::CodeDeploy::Application
    Properties:
      ApplicationName: EtherpadApplication
      ComputePlatform: Server

  CodeDeployDeploymentGroup:
    Type: AWS::CodeDeploy::DeploymentGroup
    Properties:
      ApplicationName: !Ref CodeDeployApplication
      DeploymentGroupName: EtherpadDeploymentGroup
      ServiceRoleArn: !GetAtt CodeDeployServiceRole.Arn
      DeploymentConfigName: CodeDeployDefault.OneAtATime
      AutoScalingGroups:
        - !Ref EtherpadAutoScalingGroup
      DeploymentStyle:
        DeploymentOption: WITHOUT_TRAFFIC_CONTROL
        DeploymentType: IN_PLACE
      Ec2TagFilters:
        - Key: Name
          Type: KEY_AND_VALUE
          Value: EtherpadInstance
      Deployment:
        Revision:
          RevisionType: S3
          S3Location:
            Bucket: !Ref ArtifactBucket
            BundleType: tar
            Key: etherpad-revision.zip

Outputs:
  CloudFrontDomainName:
    Description: CloudFront distribution domain name (public endpoint)
    Value: !GetAtt CloudFrontDistribution.DomainName

  ALBDnsName:
    Description: Internal DNS name of the Application Load Balancer
    Value: !GetAtt ApplicationLoadBalancer.DNSName

  RDSHostname:
    Description: Hostname of the RDS instance
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address

  ArtifactBucketName:
    Description: S3 bucket for CodeDeploy artifacts
    Value: !Ref ArtifactBucket

  CodeDeployApplicationName:
    Description: CodeDeploy application name
    Value: !Ref CodeDeployApplication

  CodeDeployDeploymentGroupName:
    Description: CodeDeploy deployment group name
    Value: !Ref CodeDeployDeploymentGroup

The solution should automate instance provisioning with a launch template that installs dependencies (Node.js, CodeDeploy agent) and signals CloudFormation upon readiness. final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'MySQL RDS with Provisioned IOPS in a Dedicated VPC'

Parameters:
  VpcCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  PrivateSubnet1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for private subnet 1
  PrivateSubnet2CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for private subnet 2
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: mydatabase
    Description: Name of the MySQL database
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: dbadmin
    Description: Master username for MySQL
  DBAllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
    Description: Allocated storage size in GB
  DBIops:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3000
    Description: Provisioned IOPS for io1 storage
  DBEngineVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: 8.0.35
    Description: MySQL engine version

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDR
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-1'

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-2'

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for MySQL RDS
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-subnet-group'

  DBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for MySQL RDS
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-sg'

  DBParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Family: mysql8.0
      Description: Custom parameter group for MySQL 8.0
      Parameters:
        character_set_server: utf8mb4
        collation_server: utf8mb4_unicode_ci

  RDSSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-secret'
      Description: Secret for MySQL RDS master credentials
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: !Sub '{"username": "${MasterUsername}"}'
        GenerateStringKey: password
        ExcludePunctuation: true
        PasswordLength: 16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-rds-secret'

  MySQLInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-mysql'
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: !Ref DBEngineVersion
      DBInstanceClass: db.r5.large
      AllocatedStorage: !Ref DBAllocatedStorage
      StorageType: io1
      Iops: !Ref DBIops
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserSecret:
        SecretArn: !Ref RDSSecret
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt DBSecurityGroup.GroupId
      MultiAZ: false
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      StorageEncrypted: true
      DeletionProtection: false
      AutoMinorVersionUpgrade: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: '03:00-04:00'
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: 'sun:05:00-sun:06:00'
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref DBParameterGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-mysql-instance'

Outputs:
  EndpointAddress:
    Description: MySQL RDS endpoint address
    Value: !GetAtt MySQLInstance.Endpoint.Address
  Port:
    Description: MySQL port
    Value: !GetAtt MySQLInstance.Endpoint.Port

needed_resources: AWS::EC2::VPC, AWS::EC2::InternetGateway, AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment, AWS::EC2::Subnet, AWS::EC2::Subnet, AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup, AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup, AWS::SecretsManager::Secret, AWS::RDS::DBInstance

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: URL-to-PNG Screenshot Service with Auto Scaling, SQS, S3, and Load Testing

Parameters:
  AMI:
    Description: AMI for EC2 instances
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets (no auto-assign public IP; instance-level via NetworkInterface)
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet2

  # Private Subnets
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet2

  # Route Tables and Associations
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateRouteTable

  NATGatewayEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NATGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NATGatewayEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NATGW

  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # Security Groups
  WorkerSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for worker EC2 instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WorkerSG

  LoadTestSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for load test EC2 instance
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LoadTestSG

  EndpointSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for VPC endpoints
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref WorkerSecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 127.0.0.1/32
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EndpointSG

  # VPC Endpoints
  SQSVpcEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      ServiceName: !Sub com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.sqs
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EndpointSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

  S3GatewayEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      ServiceName: !Sub com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.s3
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      VpcEndpointType: Gateway
      RouteTableIds:
        - !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # KMS Key for encryption
  EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for SQS queue and S3 bucket encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: "*"
      Enabled: true

  EncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub alias/${AWS::StackName}-encryption-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref EncryptionKey

  # SQS Queue
  ScreenshotQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: ScreenshotQueue
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref EncryptionKey
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 5

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: ScreenshotDLQ
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 604800
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref EncryptionKey

  # S3 Bucket
  ScreenshotBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-screenshots-${AWS::AccountId}
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref EncryptionKey

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ScreenshotBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureConnections
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource:
              - !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${ScreenshotBucket}/*
              - !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${ScreenshotBucket}
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false

  # IAM Roles
  WorkerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: WorkerInstanceRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: WorkerPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:ReceiveMessage
                  - sqs:DeleteMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueUrl
                Resource: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                Resource: !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${ScreenshotBucket}/*

  LoadTestRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: LoadTestInstanceRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LoadTestPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:SendMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueUrl
                Resource: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.Arn

  WorkerInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref WorkerRole

  LoadTestInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref LoadTestRole

  # Launch Template for Workers
  WorkerLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref AMI
        InstanceType: t3.small
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt WorkerInstanceProfile.Arn
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref WorkerSecurityGroup
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -ex

            # Install Chrome headless
            rpm --import https://dl-ssl.google.com/linux/linux_signing_key.pub
            cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/google-chrome.repo <<EOF
            [google-chrome]
            name=google-chrome
            baseurl=http://dl.google.com/linux/chrome/rpm/stable/x86_64
            enabled=1
            gpgcheck=1
            gpgkey=https://dl-ssl.google.com/linux/linux_signing_key.pub
            EOF
            yum install -y google-chrome-stable

            # Install AWS CLI v2
            yum install -y unzip
            curl -s "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip" -o "awscliv2.zip"
            unzip awscliv2.zip
            ./aws/install

            # Create worker script
            cat > /home/ec2-user/worker.sh <<'SCRIPT'
            #!/bin/bash
            QUEUE_URL="${ScreenshotQueue}"
            BUCKET="${ScreenshotBucket}"
            while true; do
              MESSAGE=$(aws sqs receive-message --queue-url "$QUEUE_URL" --wait-time-seconds 20 --region ${AWS::Region} 2>/dev/null)
              if [ -n "$MESSAGE" ]; then
                RECEIPT_HANDLE=$(echo "$MESSAGE" | jq -r '.Messages[0].ReceiptHandle')
                BODY=$(echo "$MESSAGE" | jq -r '.Messages[0].Body')
                URL=$(echo "$BODY" | jq -r '.url')
                MESSAGE_ID=$(echo "$MESSAGE" | jq -r '.Messages[0].MessageId')
                FILENAME="$MESSAGE_ID.png"
                # Take screenshot
                google-chrome-stable --headless --disable-gpu --no-sandbox --screenshot --window-size=1280,720 "$URL" --default-background-color 0
                mv screenshot.png /tmp/$FILENAME 2>/dev/null || true
                # Upload
                aws s3 cp /tmp/$FILENAME s3://$BUCKET/$FILENAME --region ${AWS::Region}
                # Delete message
                aws sqs delete-message --queue-url "$QUEUE_URL" --receipt-handle "$RECEIPT_HANDLE" --region ${AWS::Region}
                rm -f /tmp/$FILENAME
              fi
            done
            SCRIPT
            chmod +x /home/ec2-user/worker.sh
            chown ec2-user:ec2-user /home/ec2-user/worker.sh

            # Start worker in background
            su - ec2-user -c 'nohup /home/ec2-user/worker.sh &>/home/ec2-user/worker.log &'

        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: 20
              VolumeType: gp3
              Encrypted: true

  # Auto Scaling Group for Workers
  ScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: ScreenshotWorkerASG
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WorkerLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt WorkerLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: 1
      MaxSize: 2
      DesiredCapacity: 1
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ScreenshotWorker
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  # Scaling Policies
  ScaleUpPolicy:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Ref ScalingGroup
      PolicyType: SimpleScaling
      AdjustmentType: ChangeInCapacity
      ScalingAdjustment: 1
      Cooldown: 300

  ScaleDownPolicy:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Ref ScalingGroup
      PolicyType: SimpleScaling
      AdjustmentType: ChangeInCapacity
      ScalingAdjustment: -1
      Cooldown: 300

  # CloudWatch Alarms
  ScaleUpAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: QueueDepthHigh
      AlarmDescription: Scale up if queue depth >= 1
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.QueueName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref ScaleUpPolicy
      OKActions:
        - !Ref ScaleDownPolicy  # optional: on OK, but we use separate alarm for scale down

  ScaleDownAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: QueueDepthLow
      AlarmDescription: Scale down if queue depth = 0 for 5 minutes
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.QueueName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 5
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: LessThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref ScaleDownPolicy

  # Launch Template for Load Test Instance
  LoadTestLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref AMI
        InstanceType: t3.nano
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt LoadTestInstanceProfile.Arn
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref LoadTestSecurityGroup
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -ex

            # Install AWS CLI v2
            yum install -y unzip
            curl -s "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip" -o "awscliv2.zip"
            unzip awscliv2.zip
            ./aws/install

            QUEUE_URL="${ScreenshotQueue}"

            # Send sample messages (10 URLs)
            for i in {1..10}; do
              BODY="{\"url\":\"https://example.com\"}"
              # Alternate URLs for variety
              if [ $((i % 2)) -eq 0 ]; then
                BODY="{\"url\":\"https://aws.amazon.com\"}"
              fi
              aws sqs send-message --queue-url "$QUEUE_URL" --message-body "$BODY" --region ${AWS::Region}
              sleep 1
            done

            # Keep the instance running (idle) for future load testing via SSM
            # Optionally add a cron job to send messages periodically, but not required

        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: 20
              VolumeType: gp3
              Encrypted: true

  # Single-instance Auto Scaling Group for Load Test
  LoadTestScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-load-test-asg
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LoadTestLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LoadTestLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: 1
      MaxSize: 1
      DesiredCapacity: 1
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LoadTestInstance
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  SQSQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue for screenshot requests
    Value: !Ref ScreenshotQueue
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket storing screenshots
    Value: !Ref ScreenshotBucket
  AutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: Name of the worker Auto Scaling group
    Value: !Ref ScalingGroup
  LoadTestInstanceId:
    Description: Instance ID of the load test EC2 instance (via ASG)
    Value: !GetAtt LoadTestScalingGroup.AutoScalingGroupName

prompt: We need a CloudFormation template that creates a scalable URL-to-PNG screenshot service with automated load testing and S3/SQS integration, designed to dynamically process website screenshot requests and store results in a secure, distributed environment. The template should deploy an Auto Scaling group of EC2 instances (workers) across two Availability Zones, configured to consume messages from an SQS queue and generate screenshots using Chromium, saving outputs to an S3 bucket. It must include a load test instance that populates the queue with sample URL requests to simulate traffic, while CloudWatch alarms trigger scaling policies based on queue depth (scaling up/down between 1-2 instances).
